skill.name: qwen-image-pro
skill.description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs. Triggers: qwen image pro, qwen-image-pro, qwen 2 pro, alibaba image pro, dashscope pro, professional text rendering
skill.summary: Generate professional images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model. Specializes in text rendering and complex designs.
skill.author: toolshell

security_audit.summary: Security review complete. All static findings are false positives. The skill consists of documentation and example code showing users how to invoke the infsh CLI tool. No actual executable code with security implications was found. Network access is limited to the inference.sh API endpoint for image generation, which is the intended functionality.

medium_findings.title: Static Pattern Detection - External Commands
medium_findings.description: Scanner detected backtick execution patterns at multiple lines in SKILL.md. These are markdown code examples showing CLI usage, not actual executable code. The skill contains only documentation and example invocations of the infsh CLI tool.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All detected patterns are markdown code blocks showing example CLI commands that users would run in their terminal. No actual shell execution occurs within the skill itself.

medium_findings.title: Static Pattern Detection - Network URLs
medium_findings.description: Scanner detected hardcoded URLs at various lines. These are documentation links to inference.sh website and example URLs in code samples.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs are documentation links and example data in code samples, not network calls made by the skill.

medium_findings.title: Static Pattern Detection - Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
medium_findings.description: Scanner reported 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at various lines. Review shows these are false positives triggered by keywords like 'pro', table definitions, and plain text.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: No cryptographic code exists in this file. The detection is a false positive triggered by plain text content matching incorrect patterns.

content.value_statement: Create stunning images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model. This skill provides professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, and enhanced semantic adherence for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs.
actual_capabilities: Generate images with Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model via inference.sh CLI
Create professional text rendering with multi-line and paragraph-level detail
Produce fine-grained realistic images with better textures
Generate multiple image variations (1-6 images per request)
Perform image editing with reference images for style transfer
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI (infsh) to be installed
Requires valid inference.sh account and authentication

use_cases.title: Create Text-Heavy Marketing Materials
use_cases.description: Generate posters, banners, and promotional materials with precise text rendering. Specify exact text, fonts, colors, and layout for professional results.

use_cases.title: Generate Product Imagery
use_cases.description: Create realistic product photos and promotional graphics with strong semantic adherence to complex prompts.

use_cases.title: Prototype Design Concepts
use_cases.description: Quickly generate visual concepts and mockups for logos, icons, and creative artwork.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Text Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image with the text "[YOUR TEXT]" in bold [COLOR] font on a [BACKGROUND DESCRIPTION] background.

prompt_templates.title: Marketing Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a professional marketing poster for [PRODUCT NAME]. Include the main title "[TITLE]" in large bold font at the top. Add subtitle "[SUBTITLE]" below. Use [STYLE] style with [COLOR PALETTE] colors.

prompt_templates.title: Product Photography
prompt_templates.prompt: Professional product photography of [PRODUCT DESCRIPTION]. The product should be centered on a [BACKGROUND]. Lighting should be [LIGHTING STYLE]. Include the text "[BRAND NAME]" subtly in the corner.

prompt_templates.title: Image Style Transfer
prompt_templates.prompt: Using Image 1 as reference, apply the style to create [DESCRIPTION]. The composition should feature [ELEMENTS]. Output [NUMBER] variations.

output_examples.input: Poster with title "Summer Sale" in large red bold font at top center. Below, "50% Off" in yellow. White gradient background. Modern clean design.
output_examples.output: A professionally designed poster with bold red "Summer Sale" text at the top, yellow "50% Off" subtitle below, on an elegant white gradient background with modern styling.

output_examples.input: Minimalist coffee shop logo with text "Bean & Brew" in dark brown serif font on cream background
output_examples.output: A clean, minimalist logo design featuring elegant dark brown serif typography "Bean & Brew" on a warm cream colored background.

best_practices: Use quotes around exact text you want rendered: "Your Text Here"
Disable prompt_extend for precise control: set prompt_extend: false
Specify font details including color, style, size, and position for text elements
anti_patterns: Avoid overly long prompts that exceed 800 characters
Do not generate images outside the 512x512 to 2048x2048 pixel range
Avoid vague text descriptions - be specific about font, color, and placement

faq.question: How do I install the inference.sh CLI?
faq.answer: Run: npx skills add inference-sh/skills@agent-tools. This will install the infsh CLI tool required for this skill.

faq.question: Do I need an account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to run infsh login and authenticate with your inference.sh account before generating images.

faq.question: What image sizes are supported?
faq.answer: Images must be between 512x512 and 2048x2048 pixels. Common sizes include 1024x1024, 1920x1080, and 1024x1536.

faq.question: Can I generate multiple images at once?
faq.answer: Yes, use the num_images parameter to generate 1 to 6 images in a single request.

faq.question: How do I get reproducible results?
faq.answer: Set the seed parameter to a specific integer value (0-2147483647) to reproduce the same image generation.

faq.question: What is prompt_extend?
faq.answer: When enabled (default), the model rewrites your prompt for better results. Set to false for precise control over the exact output.
